memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, TSharedPtr< AccelByte::FApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > const &InApiClient=nullptr)
memberdef.name: Entitlement

memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, FAccelBytePlatformPtr const &InAccelBytePlatform)
memberdef.name: Entitlement

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserEntitlementHistoryPagingResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, EAccelByteEntitlementClass const &EntitlementClass=EAccelByteEntitlementClass::NONE, FDateTime const &StartDate=0, FDateTime const &EndDate=0, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0)
memberdef.name: GetCurrentUserEntitlementHistory

briefdescription.para: Get current user entitlements history.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsUserEntitlementHistoryPagingResult&.
This will be called when the operation fails.
Class of the entitlement (optional).
Defines the preferred starting date or time to query user entitlement history (optional).
Defines the preferred ending date or time to query user entitlement history (optional).
Number of content per page to retrieve. Default value : 20
Number of page to retrieve. Default value : 0

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &EntitlementName, FString const &ItemId, int32 Offset, int32 Limit, THandler< FAccelByteModelsEntitlementPagingSlicedResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, EAccelByteEntitlementClass EntitlementClass=EAccelByteEntitlementClass::NONE, EAccelByteAppType AppType=EAccelByteAppType::NONE, TArray< FString > const &Features={})
memberdef.name: QueryUserEntitlements

briefdescription.para: Get list of user's Entitlement(s).

parameterdescription.para: The name of the entitlement (optional).
Item's id (optional).
Offset of the list that has been sliced based on Limit parameter (optional, default = 0).
The limit of item on page (optional).
This will be called when the operation success. The result is const FAccelByteModelsEntitlementPagingSlicedResult.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Class of the entitlement (optional).
This is the type of application that entitled (optional).

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &EntitlementName, TArray< FString > const &ItemIds, int32 Offset, int32 Limit, THandler< FAccelByteModelsEntitlementPagingSlicedResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, EAccelByteEntitlementClass EntitlementClass=EAccelByteEntitlementClass::NONE, EAccelByteAppType AppType=EAccelByteAppType::NONE, TArray< FString > const &Features={})
memberdef.name: QueryUserEntitlements

briefdescription.para: Get list of user's Entitlement(s).

parameterdescription.para: The name of the entitlement (optional).
Item's id (optional).
Offset of the list that has been sliced based on Limit parameter (optional, default = 0).
The limit of item on page (optional).
This will be called when the operation success. The result is const FAccelByteModelsEntitlementPagingSlicedResult.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Class of the entitlement (optional).
This is the type of application that entitled (optional).
The feature array.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &EntitlementId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsEntitlementInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetUserEntitlementById

briefdescription.para: Get user's Entitlement by the EntitlementId.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the entitlement.
This will be called when the operation success. The result is const FAccelByteModelsEntitlementInfo.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (TArray< FString > const &EntitlementIds, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsEntitlementInfo > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bAvailablePlatformOnly=true)
memberdef.name: GetUserEntitlementByIds

briefdescription.para: Get user's entitlements based on the Entitlement Ids.

parameterdescription.para: The IDs of the entitlements to retrieve.
Callback invoked when the operation succeeds. The result is const TArray<FAccelByteModelsEntitlementInfo>.
Callback invoked when the operation fails.
If true, only checks for available platform entitlements; defaults to true.

listitem.para: This operation depends on the entitlement origin feature being enabled by the admin.
If bAvailablePlatformOnly is true, the backend returns entitlements specific to the current user's IAM client platform.
If bAvailablePlatformOnly is false, the backend returns all entitlements, regardless of platform availability.

simplesect.para: An AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &AppId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsEntitlementOwnership > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bUsePublisherNamespace=true)
memberdef.name: GetUserEntitlementOwnershipByAppId

briefdescription.para: Get user's Entitlement ownership of the AppId.

parameterdescription.para: The App ID.
This will be called when the operation success. The result is const FAccelByteModelsEntitlementOwnership.
This will be called when the operation failed.
check user entitlement in publisher namespace, by default is true.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Sku, THandler< FAccelByteModelsEntitlementOwnership > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bUsePublisherNamespace=true)
memberdef.name: GetUserEntitlementOwnershipBySku

briefdescription.para: Get user's Entitlement ownership of the sku.

parameterdescription.para: The item's SKU.
This will be called when the operation success. The result is const FAccelByteModelsEntitlementOwnership.
This will be called when the operation failed.
check user entitlement in publisher namespace, by default is true.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ItemId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsEntitlementOwnership > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bUsePublisherNamespace=false)
memberdef.name: GetUserEntitlementOwnershipByItemId

briefdescription.para: Get user's Entitlement ownership of the ItemId.

parameterdescription.para: The item's ItemId.
This will be called when the operation success. The result is const FAccelByteModelsEntitlementOwnership.
This will be called when the operation failed.
check user entitlement in publisher namespace, by default is false (to preserve the previous behaviour).

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (TArray< FString > const &ItemIds, TArray< FString > const &AppIds, TArray< FString > const &Skus, THandler< FAccelByteModelsEntitlementOwnership > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bUsePublisherNamespace=true)
memberdef.name: GetUserEntitlementOwnershipAny

briefdescription.para: Get user's Entitlement ownership for multiple checks.

parameterdescription.para: The item's IDs to check.
the app IDs to check.
the skus to check
This will be called when the operation success. The result is const FAccelByteModelsEntitlementOwnership will return true if any one parameters are owned.
This will be called when the operation failed.
check user entitlement in publisher namespace, by default is true.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &PublicKey, TArray< FString > const &ItemIds, TArray< FString > const &AppIds, TArray< FString > const &Skus, THandler< FAccelByteModelsEntitlementOwnershipDetails > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, bool VerifySignature=true, bool VerifyExpiration=true, FString const &VerifySub=TEXT(""), bool bUsePublisherNamespace=true)
memberdef.name: GetUserEntitlementOwnershipViaToken

briefdescription.para: Get user entitlement ownership if any of item IDs, app IDs, or SKUs are true.

parameterdescription.para: The Public Key that will be used to verify token
The item's IDs to check.
the app IDs to check.
the skus to check
This will be called when the operation success. The result is const FAccelByteModelsOwnershipToken.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Optional param, if true will verify the token's signature.
Optional param, if true will verify the token's expiration.
Optional param, verify the token's sub field content.
check user entitlement in publisher namespace, by default is true.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (TArray< FString > const &ItemIds, TArray< FString > const &AppIds, TArray< FString > const &Skus, THandler< FAccelByteModelsOwnershipToken > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bUsePublisherNamespace=true)
memberdef.name: GetUserEntitlementOwnershipTokenOnly

briefdescription.para: Get user entitlement ownership token if any of item IDs, app IDs, or SKUs are true.

parameterdescription.para: The item's IDs to check.
the app IDs to check.
the skus to check
This will be called when the operation success. The result is const FAccelByteModelsOwnershipToken.
This will be called when the operation failed.
check user entitlement in publisher namespace, by default is true.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &EntitlementId, int32 UseCount, THandler< FAccelByteModelsEntitlementInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, TArray< FString > const &Options={}, FString const &RequestId=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: ConsumeUserEntitlement

briefdescription.para: Consume a use entitlement.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the entitlement.
Number of consumed entitlement.
This will be called when the operation success. The result is const FAccelByteModelsEntitlementInfo.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Options of consumed entitlements.
Request id(Optional), A unique tracking ID provided by the developer, can just left it empty if they don't want to track When a request id is submitted, it will return original successful response

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ExtUserId, FAccelByteModelsAttributes const &Attributes, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: CreateDistributionReceiver

briefdescription.para: Create Distribution Receiver.

parameterdescription.para: The external user id is a random string that can be generated by yourself for the receiver.
That contain of ServerId, ServerName, CharacterId, and CharacterName.
This will be called when the operation success.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ExtUserId, FString const &UserId, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: DeleteDistributionReceiver

briefdescription.para: Delete Distribution Receiver.

parameterdescription.para: The external user id that want to be deleted in receiver.
The user id from the game.
This will be called when the operation success.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.name: GetDistributionReceiver

briefdescription.para: Get Distribution Receiver.

parameterdescription.para: The namespace of the publisher or namespace of the game.
The user id from the publisher or user id from the game.
This will be called when the operation success. The result is const TArray<FAccelByteModelsDistributionReceiver>.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ExtUserId, FAccelByteModelsAttributes const &Attributes, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateDistributionReceiver

briefdescription.para: Update Distribution Receiver.

parameterdescription.para: The external user id that has been created before for receiver.
That contain of ServerId, ServerName, CharacterId, and CharacterName.
This will be called when the operation success.
This will be called when the operation failed.

memberdef.name: SyncMobilePlatformPurchaseGoogle

briefdescription.para: Sync (Verify and fulfil) item entitlement from Google Play platform purchase.

parameterdescription.para: That contain of OrderId, PackageName, ProductId, PurchaseTime, and PurchaseToken to verify and sync item user bought from Google Play.
This will be called when the operation success.
This will be called when the operation failed.

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsPlatformSyncMobileGoogle const &SyncRequest, THandler< FAccelByteModelsPlatformSyncMobileGoogleResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SyncMobilePlatformPurchaseGooglePlay

briefdescription.para: Sync (Verify and fulfil) item entitlement from Google Play item platform purchase.

parameterdescription.para: That contain of OrderId, PackageName, ProductId, PurchaseTime, and PurchaseToken to verify and sync item user bought from Google Play.
This will be called when the operation success. The result is boolean with true value.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

parameterdescription.para: That contain of ProductId, TransactionId, ReceiptData, and ExcludeOldTransactions to verify and sync item user bought from Apple Store.

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsSyncSteamIAPTransactionRequest const &Request, THandler< FAccelByteModelsSyncSteamIAPTransactionResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SyncSteamIAPTransaction

briefdescription.para: Synchronize Steam IAP using a specific order ID. Only to be used when Steam sync mode is set to TRANSACTION in the admin portal.

parameterdescription.para: Data to attach to this request, such as Steam order ID
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SyncSteamAbnormalIAPTransaction

briefdescription.para: Synchronize abornal Steam IAP purchases. Such as when a user purchases an item from Steam, but has not yet linked an AGS account. Only to be used when Steam sync mode is set to TRANSACTION in the admin portal.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: ()=delete
memberdef.name: Entitlement

memberdef.argsstring: (Entitlement const &)=delete
memberdef.name: Entitlement

memberdef.argsstring: (Entitlement &&)=delete
memberdef.name: Entitlement

briefdescription.para: Entitlement API for checking user's ownership. User can query a list of item that belongs to him/her.
